---
title: "Plot example"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-01-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and Transfer Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(readxl) 
library(patchwork)
library(ggsignif)
library(grid)
```

```{r 1}
filename <- "" #The path to the .xlsx result file

if (!file.exists(filename)) {
  stop(paste("File not found at:", filename, "\nPlease check the path and filename."))
}

all_sheets <- excel_sheets(filename)

if (!("Transfer" %in% all_sheets)) {
  potential_match <- all_sheets[grepl("Transfer", all_sheets, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  
  if (length(potential_match) > 0) {
    print(paste("Exact sheet 'Transfer' not found. Did you mean:", potential_match[1], "? Using that instead."))
    target_sheet <- potential_match[1]
  } else {
    stop(paste("Sheet 'Transfer' not found. Please update the script to use one of these:", paste(all_sheets, collapse = ", ")))
  }
} else {
  target_sheet <- "Transfer"
}
```

```{r 2}
raw_data <- read_excel(filename, sheet = target_sheet, col_names = FALSE)
raw_data <- as.data.frame(raw_data)

extract_block <- function(data, header_row, model_label, offset = 1) {
  Start_row <- header_row + offset
  end_row <- Start_row + 9

  if (end_row > nrow(data)) end_row <- nrow(data)

  sub_df <- data[Start_row:end_row, 2:8]
  
  colnames(sub_df) <- c("Triangle", "Disease-Star", "Drug-Star", 
                        "Gene-Star", "Drug-Disease", "Gene-Disease", "Gene-Drug")
  
  sub_df[] <- lapply(sub_df, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  
  sub_df$Model <- model_label

  sub_df$Trial <- 1:nrow(sub_df)
  
  return(sub_df)
}

header_indices <- which(str_trim(raw_data[, 2]) == "Triangle")
if (length(header_indices) == 1) header_indices <- c(header_indices, header_indices + 13) 

df_trimogcl <- extract_block(raw_data, header_indices[1], "TriMoGCL", offset = 1)
df_method <- extract_block(raw_data, header_indices[2], "HANAMI", offset = 1)

all_data_wide <- rbind(df_trimogcl, df_method)

find_and_extract <- function(data, keyword, model_label) {
  idx <- which(str_detect(as.character(data[,1]), regex(keyword, ignore_case = TRUE)))
  if (length(idx) > 0) {
    val <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(data[idx[1], 2])))
    off <- 1
    if (!is.na(val)) {
       off <- 0 # Data Starts on the same line as the label
    }
    return(extract_block(data, idx[1], model_label, offset = off))
  }
  return(NULL)
}

df_trinet <- find_and_extract(raw_data, "TriNet", "TriNet")
df_n2v <- find_and_extract(raw_data, "N2V", "N2V-MLP")
df_rf <- find_and_extract(raw_data, "RF", "RF") 

if (!is.null(df_trinet)) all_data_wide <- rbind(all_data_wide, df_trinet)
if (!is.null(df_n2v)) all_data_wide <- rbind(all_data_wide, df_n2v)
if (!is.null(df_rf)) all_data_wide <- rbind(all_data_wide, df_rf) 


df_long <- all_data_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("Triangle", "Disease-Star", "Drug-Star", "Gene-Star", 
             "Drug-Disease", "Gene-Disease", "Gene-Drug"),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Score"
  )

df_long$Score <- df_long$Score / 100
df_long$Metric <- str_replace(df_long$Metric, "dsie", "Disease")

motifs <- c("Triangle", "Disease-Star", "Drug-Star", "Gene-Star", 
            "Drug-Disease", "Gene-Disease", "Gene-Drug")
df_long$Metric <- factor(df_long$Metric, levels = motifs)

methods <- c("RF", "TriNet", "N2V-MLP", "TriMoGCL", "HANAMI")
df_long$Model <- factor(df_long$Model, levels = methods)

method_colors_Transfer <- c(
  "HANAMI" = "#E28B62",  
  "N2V-MLP" = "#92B1B6",     
  "TriMoGCL" = "#CAD0BD",    
  "TriNet" = "#E1A6AD",
  "RF" = "#2C8C99" 
)

method_borders_Transfer <- c(
  "HANAMI" = "#B8552D", 
  "N2V-MLP" = "#59858C",    
  "TriMoGCL" = "#8E9F76",   
  "TriNet" = "#C46B7C",
  "RF" = "#1D5A63"
)

create_single_panel_Transfer <- function(data, motif_title, tag_label, colors, borders) {
  
  y_label_text <- if(tag_label %in% c("a", "e")) "AUROC" else NULL

  custom_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "plain", margin = margin(b = 10)),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "plain", margin = margin(r = 15)), 
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain", color="black"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.5),
      
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.line.x = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y = element_blank(),
      
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(10, 5, 5, 5),
      aspect.ratio = 1 
    )
  
  breaks <- numeric(0)
  if (motif_title == "Triangle") {
    breaks <- c(42, 53, 64, 75, 86)/ 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Disease-Star") {
    breaks <- c(42, 58, 74, 90)/ 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Drug-Star") {
    breaks <- c(46, 62, 78, 94)/ 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Gene-Star") {
    breaks <- c(45, 60, 75, 90) / 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Drug-Disease") {
    breaks <- c(43, 62, 81, 100) / 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Gene-Disease") {
    breaks <- c(42, 58, 74, 90) / 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Gene-Drug") {
    breaks <- c(34, 55, 76, 97)/ 100
  } else {
    breaks <- seq(floor(min(data$Score)), ceiling(max(data$Score)), length.out = 4)/ 100
  }
  
model_stats <- data %>%
    group_by(Model) %>%
    summarize(Median = median(Score, na.rm=TRUE), Min = min(Score, na.rm=TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    arrange(desc(Median))
  
  top2_models <- model_stats$Model[1:2]
  
  p_text <- ""
  
  tryCatch({
    d_best <- subset(data, Model == top2_models[1])
    d_second <- subset(data, Model == top2_models[2])
    d_best <- d_best[order(d_best$Trial), ]
    d_second <- d_second[order(d_second$Trial), ]
    
    if(nrow(d_best) == nrow(d_second) && nrow(d_best) >= 3) {
      t_res <- t.test(d_best$Score, d_second$Score, paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
      p_val <- t_res$p.value
      
      print(p_val)
      if (p_val < 0.001) {
        p_text <- "***"
      } else if (p_val < 0.01) {
        p_text <- "**"
      } else if (p_val < 0.05) {
        p_text <- "*"
      } else {
        p_text <- "" # Leave blank if > 0.05
      }
    }
  }, error = function(e) { p_text <- "" })

  yrange <- max(breaks) - min(breaks)

  x1 <- match(top2_models[1], levels(data$Model))
  x2 <- match(top2_models[2], levels(data$Model))

  if(!is.na(x1) && !is.na(x2)) {
    x_min_idx <- min(x1, x2)
    x_max_idx <- max(x1, x2)
    models_in_span <- levels(data$Model)[x_min_idx:x_max_idx]

    min_val_span <- min(subset(data, Model %in% models_in_span)$Score, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    min_val_span <- min(data$Score, na.rm=TRUE) # Fallback
  }

  y_line <- min_val_span - 0.05 * yrange
  
  y_limit_min <- min(min(breaks), y_line - 0.1 * yrange)
  
  y_limit_max <- max(breaks) 
  
  if(max(data$Score) > y_limit_max) y_limit_max <- max(data$Score)
  
  y_limits <- c(y_limit_min, y_limit_max)

  # Y label: AUROC
  y_label_text <- if(tag_label %in% c("a", "e")) "AUROC" else NULL
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = Model, y = Score, fill = Model, color = Model)) +
    
    # 1. VIOLIN (Centered)
    geom_violin(scale = "width", trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.6, size = 0.2, color = NA) +
    
    # 2. BOXPLOT (Centered, narrower than violin)
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.30, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, size = 0.4, color = "black") +
    
    # 3. POINTS (Centered, jittered)
    geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.4, color = "grey50", shape = 16) +
    
    # Annotations
    annotation_custom(
      grob = textGrob(label = tag_label, 
                      x = unit(-0.2, "npc"), # MOVED INSIDE textGrob
                      y = unit(1.12, "npc"),  # MOVED INSIDE textGrob
                      gp = gpar(fontsize = 22, fontface = "bold", col = "black")),
      xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf
    ) +
    
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_color_manual(values = borders) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks, limits = y_limits,
                       labels = function(x) sprintf("%g", x),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_limits, clip = "off") +
    labs(title = motif_title, x = NULL, y = y_label_text) +
    custom_theme
  
  # Add the Bracket and P-value annotation MANUALLY
  if (p_text != "") {
    tick_height <- 0.03 * yrange 
    y_tick_end <- y_line + tick_height
    
    p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x2, y = y_line, yend = y_line, 
                      size = 0.5, color = "black")
    
    p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x1, y = y_line, yend = y_tick_end, 
                      size = 0.5, color = "black")
    
    p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x2, xend = x2, y = y_line, yend = y_tick_end, 
                      size = 0.5, color = "black")
    
    p <- p + annotate("text", x = (x1 + x2)/2, y = y_line, label = p_text, 
                      vjust = 1.5, size = 7, fontface = "plain", color = "red")
  }
  
  p <- p +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_color_manual(values = borders) +

    scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks, limits = y_limits, 
                       labels = function(x) sprintf("%g", x),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))) +
    labs(
      title = motif_title, 
      x = NULL,
      y = y_label_text
    ) +
    custom_theme
  
  return(p)
}

# Ensure level_order and tags are defined based on motifs
level_order <- motifs
tags <- letters[1:length(level_order)]

plots_Transfer <- list()
for (i in 1:length(level_order)) {
  m <- level_order[i]
  m_data <- subset(df_long, Metric == m)
  plots_Transfer[[i]] <- create_single_panel_Transfer(m_data, m, tags[i], method_colors_Transfer, method_borders_Transfer)
}
plots_Transfer[[8]] <- guide_area()

plots_with_legend <- lapply(plots_Transfer, function(p) {
  p + theme(legend.position = "right") 
})
# Changed to 4 columns to create a 2-row layout (4 on top, 3 on bottom)
final_design_Transfer <- wrap_plots(plots_with_legend, ncol = 4) + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "plain"), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "cm"),
    legend.box.margin = margin(l = 20), # Centers legend in the box slightly
  )

print(final_design_Transfer)

output_path <- ""
ggsave(output_path, plot = final_design_Transfer, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300)
print(paste("Plot saved successfully to:", output_path))
```

```{r Transfer_AUPR 1}
filename <- "" #The path to the .xlsx result file

if (!file.exists(filename)) {
  stop(paste("File not found at:", filename, "\nPlease check the path and filename."))
}

all_sheets <- excel_sheets(filename)
#print(paste("Sheets found in file:", paste(all_sheets, collapse = ", ")))

if (!("Transfer_AUPR" %in% all_sheets)) {
  potential_match <- all_sheets[grepl("Transfer_AUPR", all_sheets, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  
  if (length(potential_match) > 0) {
    print(paste("Exact sheet 'Transfer_AUPR' not found. Did you mean:", potential_match[1], "? Using that instead."))
    target_sheet <- potential_match[1]
  } else {
    stop(paste("Sheet 'Transfer_AUPR' not found. Please update the script to use one of these:", paste(all_sheets, collapse = ", ")))
  }
} else {
  target_sheet <- "Transfer_AUPR"
}
```

```{r Transfer_AUPRC 2}
raw_data <- read_excel(filename, sheet = target_sheet, col_names = FALSE)
raw_data <- as.data.frame(raw_data)

extract_block <- function(data, header_row, model_label, offset = 1) {
  Start_row <- header_row + offset
  end_row <- Start_row + 9

  if (end_row > nrow(data)) end_row <- nrow(data)

  sub_df <- data[Start_row:end_row, 2:8]
  
  colnames(sub_df) <- c("Triangle", "Disease-Star", "Drug-Star", 
                        "Gene-Star", "Drug-Disease", "Gene-Disease", "Gene-Drug")
  
  sub_df[] <- lapply(sub_df, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  
  sub_df$Model <- model_label

  sub_df$Trial <- 1:nrow(sub_df)
  
  return(sub_df)
}

header_indices <- which(str_trim(raw_data[, 2]) == "Triangle")
if (length(header_indices) == 1) header_indices <- c(header_indices, header_indices + 13) 

df_trimogcl <- extract_block(raw_data, header_indices[1], "TriMoGCL", offset = 1)
df_method <- extract_block(raw_data, header_indices[2], "HANAMI", offset = 1)

all_data_wide <- rbind(df_trimogcl, df_method)

find_and_extract <- function(data, keyword, model_label) {
  idx <- which(str_detect(as.character(data[,1]), regex(keyword, ignore_case = TRUE)))
  if (length(idx) > 0) {
    val <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(data[idx[1], 2])))
    off <- 1
    if (!is.na(val)) {
       off <- 0 # Data Starts on the same line as the label
    }
    return(extract_block(data, idx[1], model_label, offset = off))
  }
  return(NULL)
}

df_trinet <- find_and_extract(raw_data, "TriNet", "TriNet")
df_n2v <- find_and_extract(raw_data, "N2V", "N2V-MLP")
df_rf <- find_and_extract(raw_data, "RF", "RF") 

if (!is.null(df_trinet)) all_data_wide <- rbind(all_data_wide, df_trinet)
if (!is.null(df_n2v)) all_data_wide <- rbind(all_data_wide, df_n2v)
if (!is.null(df_rf)) all_data_wide <- rbind(all_data_wide, df_rf) 


df_long <- all_data_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("Triangle", "Disease-Star", "Drug-Star", "Gene-Star", 
             "Drug-Disease", "Gene-Disease", "Gene-Drug"),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Score"
  )

df_long$Score <- df_long$Score / 100
df_long$Metric <- str_replace(df_long$Metric, "dsie", "Disease")

motifs <- c("Triangle", "Disease-Star", "Drug-Star", "Gene-Star", 
            "Drug-Disease", "Gene-Disease", "Gene-Drug")
df_long$Metric <- factor(df_long$Metric, levels = motifs)

methods <- c("RF", "TriNet", "N2V-MLP", "TriMoGCL", "HANAMI")
df_long$Model <- factor(df_long$Model, levels = methods)

method_colors_Transfer <- c(
  "HANAMI" = "#E28B62",  
  "N2V-MLP" = "#92B1B6",     
  "TriMoGCL" = "#CAD0BD",    
  "TriNet" = "#E1A6AD",
  "RF" = "#2C8C99" 
)

method_borders_Transfer <- c(
  "HANAMI" = "#B8552D", 
  "N2V-MLP" = "#59858C",    
  "TriMoGCL" = "#8E9F76",   
  "TriNet" = "#C46B7C",
  "RF" = "#1D5A63"
)

create_single_panel_Transfer <- function(data, motif_title, tag_label, colors, borders) {
  
  y_label_text <- if(tag_label %in% c("a", "e")) "AUPRC" else NULL

  custom_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "plain", margin = margin(b = 10)),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "plain", margin = margin(r = 15)), 
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "plain", color="black"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.5),
      
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.line.x = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y = element_blank(),
      
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(10, 5, 5, 5),
      aspect.ratio = 1 
    )
  
  breaks <- numeric(0)
  if (motif_title == "Triangle") {
    breaks <- c(42, 53, 64, 75, 86)/ 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Disease-Star") {
    breaks <- c(42, 58, 74, 90)/ 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Drug-Star") {
    breaks <- c(46, 62, 78, 94)/ 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Gene-Star") {
    breaks <- c(45, 60, 75, 90) / 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Drug-Disease") {
    breaks <- c(46, 64, 82, 100) / 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Gene-Disease") {
    breaks <- c(45, 60, 75, 90) / 100
  } else if (motif_title == "Gene-Drug") {
    breaks <- c(40, 59, 78, 97)/ 100
  } else {
    breaks <- seq(floor(min(data$Score)), ceiling(max(data$Score)), length.out = 4)/ 100
  }
  
  model_stats <- data %>%
    group_by(Model) %>%
    summarize(Median = median(Score, na.rm=TRUE), Min = min(Score, na.rm=TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    arrange(desc(Median))
  
  top2_models <- model_stats$Model[1:2]
  
  p_text <- ""
  
  tryCatch({
    d_best <- subset(data, Model == top2_models[1])
    d_second <- subset(data, Model == top2_models[2])
    d_best <- d_best[order(d_best$Trial), ]
    d_second <- d_second[order(d_second$Trial), ]
    
    if(nrow(d_best) == nrow(d_second) && nrow(d_best) >= 3) {
      t_res <- t.test(d_best$Score, d_second$Score, paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
      p_val <- t_res$p.value
      
      # NEW LOGIC: Use Asterisks
      if (p_val < 0.001) {
        p_text <- "***"
      } else if (p_val < 0.01) {
        p_text <- "**"
      } else if (p_val < 0.05) {
        p_text <- "*"
      } else {
        p_text <- "" # Leave blank if > 0.05
      }
    }
  }, error = function(e) { p_text <- "" })

  yrange <- max(breaks) - min(breaks)

  x1 <- match(top2_models[1], levels(data$Model))
  x2 <- match(top2_models[2], levels(data$Model))

  if(!is.na(x1) && !is.na(x2)) {
    x_min_idx <- min(x1, x2)
    x_max_idx <- max(x1, x2)
    models_in_span <- levels(data$Model)[x_min_idx:x_max_idx]

    min_val_span <- min(subset(data, Model %in% models_in_span)$Score, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    min_val_span <- min(data$Score, na.rm=TRUE) # Fallback
  }

  y_line <- min_val_span - 0.05 * yrange
  
  y_limit_min <- min(min(breaks), y_line - 0.1 * yrange)
  
  y_limit_max <- max(breaks) 
  
  if(max(data$Score) > y_limit_max) y_limit_max <- max(data$Score)
  
  y_limits <- c(y_limit_min, y_limit_max)

  # Y label: AUPRC
  y_label_text <- if(tag_label %in% c("a", "e")) "AUPRC" else NULL
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = Model, y = Score, fill = Model, color = Model)) +
    
    # 1. VIOLIN (Centered)
    geom_violin(scale = "width", trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.6, size = 0.2, color = NA) +
    
    # 2. BOXPLOT (Centered, narrower than violin)
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.30, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, size = 0.4, color = "black") +
    
    # 3. POINTS (Centered, jittered)
    geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.4, color = "grey50", shape = 16) +
    
    # Annotations
    annotation_custom(
      grob = textGrob(label = tag_label, 
                      x = unit(-0.2, "npc"), # MOVED INSIDE textGrob
                      y = unit(1.12, "npc"),  # MOVED INSIDE textGrob
                      gp = gpar(fontsize = 22, fontface = "bold", col = "black")),
      xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf
    ) +
    
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_color_manual(values = borders) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks, limits = y_limits,
                       labels = function(x) sprintf("%g", x),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_limits, clip = "off") +
    labs(title = motif_title, x = NULL, y = y_label_text) +
    custom_theme
  
  # Add the Bracket and P-value annotation MANUALLY
  if (p_text != "") {
    tick_height <- 0.03 * yrange 
    y_tick_end <- y_line + tick_height
    
    p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x2, y = y_line, yend = y_line, 
                      size = 0.5, color = "black")
    
    p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x1, y = y_line, yend = y_tick_end, 
                      size = 0.5, color = "black")
    
    p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x2, xend = x2, y = y_line, yend = y_tick_end, 
                      size = 0.5, color = "black")
    
    p <- p + annotate("text", x = (x1 + x2)/2, y = y_line, label = p_text, 
                      vjust = 1.5, size = 7, fontface = "plain", color = "red")
  }
  
  p <- p +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_color_manual(values = borders) +

    scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks, limits = y_limits, 
                       labels = function(x) sprintf("%g", x),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))) +
    labs(
      title = motif_title, 
      x = NULL,
      y = y_label_text
    ) +
    custom_theme
  
  return(p)
}

# Ensure level_order and tags are defined based on motifs
level_order <- motifs
tags <- letters[1:length(level_order)]

plots_Transfer <- list()
for (i in 1:length(level_order)) {
  m <- level_order[i]
  m_data <- subset(df_long, Metric == m)
  plots_Transfer[[i]] <- create_single_panel_Transfer(m_data, m, tags[i], method_colors_Transfer, method_borders_Transfer)
}
plots_Transfer[[8]] <- guide_area()

plots_with_legend <- lapply(plots_Transfer, function(p) {
  p + theme(legend.position = "right") 
})
# Changed to 4 columns to create a 2-row layout (4 on top, 3 on bottom)
final_design_Transfer <- wrap_plots(plots_with_legend, ncol = 4) + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "plain"), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "cm"),
    legend.box.margin = margin(l = 20), # Centers legend in the box slightly
  )

print(final_design_Transfer)

output_path <- ""
ggsave(output_path, plot = final_design_Transfer, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300)
print(paste("Plot saved successfully to:", output_path))
```
